items.title: Cole Palmer At Risk Of Losing World Cup Spot to Nottingham Forest's Gibbs-White
items.summary: Cole Palmer will go head-to-head with the player who poses an existential threat to his World Cup dream in Morgan Gibbs-White on Monday.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.

items.title: Hearts chase history as Rangers reach critical point
items.summary: "Tynecastle will be an electrifying experience," writes Tom English, previewing Rangers' visit to Scottish Premiership pacesetters Heart of Midlothian.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Hardie owns big stage to help Zalmi lift second PSL title
items.summary: Australia allrounder took four wickets and followed up with unbeaten half-century to help see off Kingsmen
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.
